name: smart_classroom_mindmap
description: Generate a jsMind-compatible JSON mind map from a Smart Classroom summary. Can be chained directly after smart_classroom_audio_summary.

session_id.description: Existing Smart Classroom session ID. When provided, the skill reads summary.md from the session directory. Pass the 'session_id' returned by smart_classroom_audio_summary.

summary_markdown.description: Markdown summary text to generate a mind map from. Pass the 'summary_markdown' returned by smart_classroom_audio_summary. When provided, the skill writes it to the session directory before calling the pipeline.

language.description: Language of the summary, controls which system prompt is used.

output_format.description: Requested output format. The LLM is always instructed to produce jsMind JSON; 'raw' disables JSON parsing of the result.

include_raw.description: When true, always include the raw LLM output string in the response even if JSON parsing succeeded.

session_id.description: Smart Classroom session identifier used or created for this request.

mindmap.description: Parsed jsMind JSON object with 'meta', 'format', and 'data' keys. null when JSON parsing failed.

raw_mindmap.description: Raw LLM output string. Always present when 'mindmap' is null or 'include_raw' is true.

format.description: Actual format of the 'mindmap' field: 'jsmind_json' when parsing succeeded, 'raw' otherwise.

source.description: Indicates whether the summary was read from an existing session artifact or from the caller-supplied 'summary_markdown'.

notes: The LLM prompt in config.yaml instructs the model to produce jsMind JSON (not Mermaid). The output_format parameter is reserved for future extensibility.
When the summary is shorter than config.yaml mindmap.min_token, the pipeline returns a structured 'insufficient_input' jsMind JSON. The skill parses and returns this normally.
When summary_markdown is provided together with session_id, the supplied markdown overwrites the existing summary.md in that session.
Requires the Smart Classroom runtime environment (LLM model, config.yaml, runtime_config.yaml).
The PYTHONPATH / working directory must be set to education-ai-suite/smart-classroom.
